rationale: Builds directly on the current late projection EMA winner, but stops feeding the EMA with the first quant-aware snap when the model is still adapting to the roundtrip constraint. The new change delays projection EMA collection until after the second quant-aware roundtrip, so the finalizer averages only the already-adapted late projection states. That compounds the winning endgame path, keeps artifact size unchanged, adds essentially no hot-loop cost, and targets the final int8 roundtrip score more narrowly than broadening the quantizer again.
title: Second-Snap Projection EMA Finalizer
